libraries.title: fliplet-analytics-spa
libraries.description: Auto page-view tracker for V3 SPA apps. Hooks the History API so every client-side route change emits a pageView — no app code required.

libraries.title: Fliplet.App.Submissions
libraries.description: Read App Store and Google Play submission metadata for the current Fliplet app — version, status, build numbers — via the fliplet-app-submissions package.

libraries.title: Fliplet.Media.Audio
libraries.description: Play, pause, stop, and seek audio files on device or from a URL in Fliplet apps via the Audio namespace.

libraries.title: V3 barcodes
libraries.description: Scan and generate QR codes and barcodes in V3 apps with Fliplet.Barcode — attachScanner() to scan (web + native) and encode() to render barcode images.

libraries.title: Fliplet.Chat
libraries.description: Build one-to-one, group, and public-channel chat features. Fliplet.Chat owns the conversations and messages data sources internally — supply only the contacts list (who can chat with whom).
libraries.notes: Owns the conversations and messages data sources internally — never propose `Conversations`, `Messages`, `Typing Status`, or similar data sources of your own. The only data source you design is the `contacts` list passed to `Fliplet.Chat.connect()` (who can chat with whom).

libraries.title: Fliplet.Communicate
libraries.description: Send email, SMS, push notifications, and share URLs from a Fliplet app using a single Communicate namespace.

libraries.title: Fliplet.DataSources
libraries.description: Connect to, query, insert, update, and delete records in Fliplet Data Sources from inside an app. All methods are promise-based.

libraries.title: Fliplet.DataSources.Encryption
libraries.description: Automatically encrypt and decrypt selected Data Source columns on-device by registering a private key and column list.
libraries.notes: Installing this package transparently encrypts and decrypts the configured columns on every Fliplet.DataSources find/insert/update call — only install when you intend to encrypt, otherwise it will silently alter data-source operations.

libraries.title: fliplet-error-tracking
libraries.description: Auto-loading runtime that captures JavaScript exceptions and unhandled promise rejections and batches them to Fliplet.App.Logs.

libraries.title: V3 media
libraries.description: Capture or select a photo and upload files in V3 apps with Fliplet.Media — capture() to take or pick a photo (web + native) and Files.upload() to store it and get a URL back.

libraries.title: Fliplet.Native
libraries.description: Cordova-bridge APIs for native Fliplet apps — app management, updates, downloads, locale, notifications, status bar, and lifecycle interactions.
libraries.notes: Native-wrapper-only. Feature-detect via Fliplet.Env.get('platform') === 'native' before calling. Calls are no-ops or throw on web.

libraries.title: Fliplet.Notifications
libraries.description: Read, send, and schedule in-app and push notifications in Fliplet apps, with support for scopes, read receipts, and badge counts.

libraries.title: Fliplet.Payments
libraries.description: Accept Stripe payments and checkout in Fliplet apps via Fliplet.Payments, with a products data source and webhook-driven order tracking.

libraries.title: Fliplet Router JS API
libraries.description: Fliplet.Router JS API reference for V3 apps. Covers getBasePath, isNative, getHistoryMode (platform-conditional history — path on web, hash on native), getRouteManifest, getRouteConfig, and resolveRo…
libraries.notes: Auto-loaded on V3 apps at boot. Depends on fliplet-core (Fliplet.Env, Fliplet.User) and fliplet-media (Fliplet.Media.getContents). Do not call Fliplet.Media.getContents directly for screen fetches — resolveRoute already does this and returns content in result.content.

libraries.title: fliplet-runtime
libraries.description: V3 SPA bootstrap that wires Fliplet.Env, Registry, Studio, Navigator, and Locale into the global Fliplet object and manages the page-ready lifecycle.

libraries.title: Fliplet.Security
libraries.description: Persist a per-app structured object to encrypted device storage via the fliplet-security package — for app-local secrets, device tokens, and per-user preferences. Distinct from fliplet-encryption (Da…

libraries.title: fliplet-service-worker
libraries.description: Background service worker that receives web push notifications, displays them, and marks them read — automatically registered by fliplet-core on web.
libraries.notes: Runs in the service-worker context, not the app context. No callable JS API. Behavior is automatic once registered.

libraries.title: Fliplet.Session
libraries.description: Read, write, and clear the current user session — including cached offline sessions — for authentication state in Fliplet apps.

libraries.title: Fliplet.Socket
libraries.description: Real-time WebSocket connection to the Fliplet API with auto-authentication, server URL discovery, and dev/prod transport fallback via the fliplet-socket package.

libraries.title: Fliplet.App.Tokens
libraries.description: Read the list of API tokens that authorise external services and backend integrations to call Fliplet APIs on behalf of an app.

libraries.title: App Actions V3
libraries.description: Write and run JavaScript code directly on the server or client to perform automations, scheduled tasks and on-demand operations.

libraries.title: Fliplet common functions
libraries.description: Utility helpers on the global `Fliplet` object: `Fliplet.compile()` for templating and `Fliplet.guid()` for unique IDs.

libraries.title: Fliplet.AI
libraries.description: Build AI features with `Fliplet.AI` — chat, completions, streaming, image generation, transcription, and embeddings via OpenAI or Google Gemini proxies.

libraries.title: Fliplet.Analytics
libraries.description: Enable, disable, and check analytics tracking, and record custom app events and page views from JavaScript.

libraries.title: Fliplet.API.request()
libraries.description: Make authenticated HTTP requests to Fliplet APIs with automatic URL construction, caching, offline queueing, and error handling.

libraries.title: Fliplet.App
libraries.description: Retrieve the current app's public slug, build shareable screen URLs, and access app-level settings from JavaScript.

libraries.title: Fliplet.Apps
libraries.description: List the Fliplet apps the current user can access, and filter between legacy V1 and modern V2 apps.

libraries.title: Fliplet.Cache
libraries.description: Run async operations once and memoize their results, with optional expiry and background refresh.

libraries.title: Fliplet.Encode
libraries.description: Encode strings as base64 and double-encode URL query parameters safely for transport.

libraries.title: Fliplet.Env
libraries.description: Read environment variables such as `appId`, `appName`, `mode`, and `apiUrl` from the current runtime.

libraries.title: Fliplet.Hooks
libraries.description: Register callbacks that run before or after key app events (e.g. form submit), with sync or async Promise handlers.

libraries.title: Fliplet.Locale
libraries.description: Translate strings and format dates and numbers in Fliplet components via Fliplet.Locale, the T() shorthand, and translation.json files using i18next.

libraries.title: Fliplet.Navigate
libraries.description: Navigate between app screens, open external URLs, pass query parameters, and handle back, home, and modal navigation via Fliplet.Navigate.

libraries.title: Fliplet.Navigator
libraries.description: Detect online/offline state, listen for connectivity changes, and wait for the device to be ready.

libraries.title: Fliplet.Navigator.Notifications
libraries.description: Check notification support, request permission, and send local device notifications from JavaScript.

libraries.title: Fliplet.Organizations
libraries.description: List the current user's organizations and fetch audit logs with filters for type, date range, app, and session.

libraries.title: Fliplet.Pages and Fliplet.Page
libraries.description: List app screens, get the current screen's public URL, and build shareable URLs for any screen by ID.

libraries.title: Fliplet.parseError()
libraries.description: Turn any error response or object into a human-readable message by scanning common error properties.

libraries.title: Fliplet.Profile
libraries.description: Read and write namespaced user profile attributes (email, name, company, phone) and fetch the device UUID.

libraries.title: Fliplet.Registry
libraries.description: Store and retrieve runtime values and functions by key so components can share state and helpers.

libraries.title: Fliplet.require
libraries.description: Load scripts and stylesheets on demand, and resolve lazy dependencies registered in the app bundle.

libraries.title: Fliplet.Storage and Fliplet.App.Storage
libraries.description: Persist JSON-serializable values to device or browser storage, scoped globally or to the current app.

libraries.title: Fliplet.Studio
libraries.description: Emit events to Fliplet Studio and listen for events from it when building widget interfaces.

libraries.title: Fliplet.User
libraries.description: Get and set the current user's auth token, profile details, and preferences, and sign the user out.

libraries.title: Fliplet.User.Biometrics
libraries.description: Check biometric availability and verify users with Face ID, Touch ID, or fingerprint inside native Fliplet apps.

libraries.title: Fliplet.Widget
libraries.description: Access widget instance IDs, settings, and data, and coordinate save and ready events between widget and interface.
